description: Balanced urban resilience across exposure vulnerability service continuity adaptation ecology equity and maladaptation risk.
Prioritizes reducing exposure to heat flood coastal fire and infrastructure hazards.
Prioritizes housing health income energy burden disability access and social vulnerability.
Prioritizes water power transport sanitation health cooling communications and emergency services.
Prioritizes monitoring learning flexible standards institutional capacity and adaptation pathways.
Prioritizes trees wetlands parks soils water absorption biodiversity and urban ecological function.
Prioritizes vulnerable residents anti-displacement community authority and fair recovery.
Prioritizes penalties for displacement false security risk transfer emissions-intensive adaptation and digital exclusion.
